title: Spicy Korean Shrimp Stew
description: A spicy and flavorful stew made with succulent shrimp and a blend of Korean spices. This dish is perfect for a quick and delicious meal.

ingredients.name: korean chili flakes (gochugaru)
ingredients.notes: adjust to desired level of spiciness

instructions: Heat the sesame oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes, until pink and cooked through.
Add the sliced mellow, Korean chili flakes, soy sauce, and brown sugar. Stir to combine.
Pour in the stew and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5-7 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped green onions and additional Korean chili flakes if desired.
